heading: Band leaders
label: 424 Band leaders

children.label: a
children.text: The leader of the Army Band is entitled to the allowances of a captain in the Army.

children.label: b
children.text: The leader of the United States Navy Band is entitled to the allowances of a lieutenant of the Navy.

children.label: c
children.text: A member of the Marine Corps who is appointed as director or assistant director of the United States Marine Corps Band under , is entitled, while serving thereunder, only to the allowances of an officer in the grade in which he is serving. However, his allowances may not be less than those to which he was entitled at the time of his appointment under that section.section 8287 of title 10

children.label: d
children.text: The leader of the Naval Academy Band is entitled to the allowances of the pay grade prescribed for him by the Secretary of Navy under . The second leader is entitled to the allowances of a warrant officer, W–1.section 207(e) of this title

children.label: e
children.text: The director of the Coast Guard Band is entitled to the allowances of an officer in the grade in which he is serving. However, his allowances may not be less than those to which he was entitled at the time of his appointment as director.
